creator: dan.kotowski@a9development.com
text:
(In reply to Jesper Schmitz Mouridsen from comment #5)

No, I can reproduce on Intel i915

$ xwinfo -root -children

xwininfo: Window id: 0x617 (the root window) (has no name)
